---
title: " "
pagetitle: "Resume · Miquel Sirera"
description-meta: "Resume and background for Miquel Sirera Perelló."
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-hero">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="ph-label">/ resume</div>
    <h1>Background and <span class="accent">experience.</span></h1>
    <p class="ph-lede">From data science at UPC in Barcelona to a PhD in distributed LLMs at Northeastern.</p>
    <div class="hero-cta" style="margin-top: 2rem;">
      <a class="btn-pill primary" href="./files/MiquelSirera_AcademicCV_Sep2025.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Academic CV ↗</a>
      <a class="btn-pill ghost" href="./files/MiquelSireraPerelloPhDNEU_Sep2025.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Industry CV ↗</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<section class="section">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <header class="section-head">
      <div class="section-label">/ profile</div>
      <div>
        <h2 class="section-title">A bit <span class="accent">about me.</span></h2>
        <p class="section-lede">
          BSc in Data Science and Engineering from UPC. Solid foundation in CS, math,
          statistics, and signal processing. Now doing a PhD in Computer Engineering at
          Northeastern, focused on work that ships and pushes ML and distributed systems
          forward.
        </p>
      </div>
    </header>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section" style="border-top: 1px solid var(--border);">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <header class="section-head">
      <div class="section-label">/ education</div>
      <div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Where I <span class="accent">studied.</span></h2>
      </div>
    </header>

    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">Jan 2024 — Present</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>PhD in Computer Engineering</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">Northeastern University · Boston</p>
          <p class="tl-body">
            Working at the intersection of ML, LLMs, distributed training and inference, and edge AI.
            Interested in making models more resilient, in running AI efficiently on edge and cloud,
            and in how AI can improve telecom — network performance and automation. Especially
            curious about LLMs: attention, knowledge representation, and editing.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">Sep 2019 — Jul 2023</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>BSc in Data Science &amp; Engineering</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya · Barcelona</p>
          <p class="tl-body">
            GPA 8.89/10. Honors in four courses: Discrete Mathematics &amp; Logic, Mathematical
            Optimization, Search and Analysis of Information, and Advanced Topics of Data Science.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">Sep 2017 — Jun 2019</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>High School</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">La Salle Bonanova · Barcelona</p>
          <p class="tl-body">
            Graduated with honors. Scored 13.556/14 on the PAU university entrance exams.
            Math contests (Pangea, "Fem Matemàtiques") and extra math enrichment.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section" style="border-top: 1px solid var(--border);">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <header class="section-head">
      <div class="section-label">/ experience</div>
      <div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Things I've <span class="accent">worked on.</span></h2>
      </div>
    </header>

    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">Feb 2023 — Jul 2023</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>BSc Thesis · Genesys Lab</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">Northeastern · Institute for the Wireless Internet of Things</p>
          <p class="tl-body">
            AI for wireless communications. Designed and implemented AI-based approaches for
            signal classification. This work got me into AI + wireless and I've been here since.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">Mar 2022 — Dec 2022</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>AI Engineer Intern</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">Abi Global Health</p>
          <p class="tl-body">
            Internship at a global tele-health company. Improved monitoring in their MLOps
            setup and helped the AI Lab build new ML models and improve existing ones.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-row">
        <div class="tl-date">Feb 2022 — Jun 2022</div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <h3>BECO · environmentally-conscious decisions</h3>
          <p class="tl-place">Naptilus Tech Lab</p>
          <p class="tl-body">
            Built a software product that used user data to help people reduce their carbon
            footprint. Shipped "BECO" — an app that used ML to suggest more sustainable options.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="contact-cta">
  <div class="contact-eyebrow">/ Get in touch</div>
  <h2>Want to <span class="accent">work together?</span></h2>
  <p>Best way is email. I read everything, even if my replies aren't always fast.</p>
  <div class="hero-cta" style="justify-content:center;">
    <a class="btn-pill primary" href="mailto:sirera.m@northeastern.edu">sirera.m@northeastern.edu</a>
    <a class="btn-pill ghost" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mqsirera/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn ↗</a>
  </div>
</section>
```
